detail.description:
"
The Iconic Korean Arcade Game, Loved by 50 Million Players  

Just press the button and climb the stairs—simple yet incredibly addictive action arcade gameplay!
Free to play, easy to control, and fun for everyone—from preschoolers to kids, teens, and adults.

Play with popular characters like Brain Rot, Catch! Teenieping, Shinbi Apartment, and Demon Hunters, 
and collect from over 1,000 unique characters!

   - Boost your focus and reflexes
   - Featured on Google Play & App Store
   - 10 year
